segments.text: Welcome to Data Systems Design. In this course, we will explore the key concepts and techniques for designing reliable, scalable, and maintainable systems.
When designing a data system or service, we need to consider several key factors. We want our system to be reliable, scalable, and maintainable.
Data models are a crucial part of developing software. They have a profound effect on how we think about the problem that we are solving.
MapReduce is a programming model for distributed execution on a cluster of machines. It can be used to implement higher-level query languages like SQL.
